task_completion.description: Verify the Autopsy case is created with the correct name and number.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy main window or 'New Case Information' dialog showing the case name 'Targeted_Ingest_2024' and case number 'INV-TGT-001'.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct disk image data source is added to the case.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Autopsy data source tree or 'Add Data Source' dialog showing the path '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Warrant_Scope' File Ingest Filter is created with the correct extensions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'File Ingest Filter' settings dialog showing a filter named 'Warrant_Scope' configured to include the extensions: txt, pdf, doc, jpg, and jpeg.

task_completion.description: Verify only 'Hash Lookup' and 'File Type Identification' modules are enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Run Ingest Modules' dialog. The checkboxes for 'Hash Lookup' and 'File Type Identification' must be checked, and all other module checkboxes must be unchecked.

task_completion.description: Verify the audit report is created with the exact required sections and populated numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor or terminal displaying the contents of '/home/ga/Reports/filter_audit.txt'. It must contain 'WARRANT_SCOPE_EXTENSIONS: txt, pdf, doc, jpg, jpeg', 'TOTAL_FILES_ON_DISK:', 'IN_SCOPE_FILES_PROCESSED:', 'OUT_OF_SCOPE_FILES_IGNORED:', and 'VERIFICATION_STATEMENT: I verify that Hash and MIME type metadata was only generated for in-scope files.' The <N> placeholders must be replaced with actual numbers.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the Autopsy GUI to perform the forensic tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing the Autopsy graphical user interface being actively used (e.g., dialog boxes, progress bars, data source tree) rather than just terminal commands modifying SQLite databases directly.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually ran the ingest process and extracted real numbers for the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The audit report should contain actual integer values for TOTAL_FILES_ON_DISK, IN_SCOPE_FILES_PROCESSED, and OUT_OF_SCOPE_FILES_IGNORED, not the literal string '<N>' or obviously fake/placeholder numbers.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not just create the text report without interacting with Autopsy.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be evidence of Autopsy processing the image (e.g., ingest progress bar in the lower right corner of Autopsy) before the report file is written.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating an Autopsy case named 'Targeted_Ingest_2024' (Case Number: 'INV-TGT-001') and adding the disk image '/home/ga/evidence/ntfs_undel.dd'. A File Ingest Filter named 'Warrant_Scope' must be created for extensions txt, pdf, doc, jpg, jpeg. Only 'Hash Lookup' and 'File Type Identification' modules should be run. The final report must be saved to '/home/ga/Reports/filter_audit.txt' with specific exact section headers.
